Acme Corp Employee Handbook

Working Hours
Standard working hours are from nine in the morning to five in the afternoon, Monday
through Friday. Employees are entitled to a one hour unpaid lunch break each day. Core
collaboration hours, during which all team members are expected to be available, run
from ten in the morning to three in the afternoon.

Remote Work
Acme Corp operates a hybrid work model. Employees may work remotely up to three days
per week. Fully remote arrangements require approval from a department head and are
reviewed on an annual basis. Remote employees must maintain a reliable internet
connection and be reachable during core collaboration hours.

Paid Time Off
Full-time employees accrue twenty days of paid vacation per year, in addition to ten
paid public holidays. Unused vacation days, up to a maximum of five, may be carried
over into the following calendar year. Sick leave is granted separately at ten days
per year and does not roll over.

Parental Leave
New parents are entitled to sixteen weeks of paid parental leave, which may be taken
at any point within the first twelve months following the birth or adoption of a
child. Parental leave may be taken in up to three separate blocks.

Professional Development
Each employee receives an annual professional development budget of two thousand
dollars, which may be used for courses, conferences, certifications, or books that are
relevant to their role. Unused development budget does not carry over between years.

Code of Conduct
All employees are expected to treat colleagues, customers, and partners with respect
and professionalism. Harassment, discrimination, and retaliation are strictly
prohibited and may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination.
